case_title: OSMAR PLATERO VS. RUBEN GOMEZ et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PLATERO, OSMAR AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, RUBEN RODAS, GLADIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLATERO, OSMAR AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, RUBEN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLATERO, OSMAR AS TO DEFENDANT RODAS, GLADIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLATERO, OSMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODAS, GLADIS $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,595.00, DEFENDANT RUBEN GOMEZ DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANTS NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2008 - CONTINUED TO APR-07-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT RUBEN GOMEZ NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT GLADIS RODAS IS PRESENT, HOWEVER SHE DOES NOT STIPULATE TO HAVING JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER HEARING THE CASE. MATTER CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR THE CASE. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE DEFENDANT RUBEN GOMEZ. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER, CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO RUBEN GOMEZ BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-07-2008 AT 3:30PM.
